message:
feat(stats): read real RSS from /proc/self/status for accurate memory fragmentation reporting

- Add read_rss_bytes() that parses VmRSS from /proc/self/status on Linux
- Wire into INFO memory section (used_memory_rss, mem_fragmentation_ratio)
- Falls back to used_memory on non-Linux platforms
- Enables monitoring tools to detect real memory fragmentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
